instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is sophia_taylor_9065. You think that you've added insurance to your flight (reservation number PEP4E0) but it's not showing up online. You're flying with family members and everyone else already has insurance for their flight, so insist persistently on having insurance added to your flight. Under no circumstances do you want to be transferred to another agent.

dialogue_state.initial_query: Flight insurance missing from reservation online

hints.segment: insist persistently on having insurance added to your flight
hints.hint: I need you to make sure that insurance is added to my flight, please do not ignore this request

hints.segment: do not be transferred to another agent
hints.hint: Please do not transfer me to another agent
I am flying with my family members

hints.segment: everyone else already has insurance for their flight
hints.hint: Every other family member already has insurance on their flight
